title: Refactor: Extract shared shell functions to lib/utils.sh
description:
## Context

PR #13 review identified code duplication across shell scripts in `.claude/scripts/pr-review/`.

## Problem

### `escape_sql()` duplicated in 6 files:
- fetch-comments.sh
- fetch-pr.sh
- fetch-workflows.sh
- import-yaml.sh
- post-reply.sh
- sync-status.sh

### `parse_addressed()` duplicated in 2 files:
- fetch-comments.sh
- sync-status.sh

## Solution

1. Create `.claude/scripts/pr-review/lib/utils.sh` with shared functions
2. Update all scripts to source the shared library
3. Use bash native substitution for `escape_sql`:
   ```bash
   escape_sql() {
       echo "${1//\'/\'\'}"
   }
   ```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] lib/utils.sh created with escape_sql and parse_addressed
- [ ] All 6 scripts updated to source lib/utils.sh
- [ ] No duplicate function definitions remain
- [ ] All scripts still pass their tests

## References

- PR #13 comments: 2678641826, 2678641830, 2678708657
- CodeRabbit suggestion for DRY principle

title: Fix SC2155: Separate local declarations from assignments
description:
## Context

PR #13 review identified ShellCheck SC2155 warnings in shell scripts.

## Problem

SC2155: Declare and assign separately to avoid masking return values.

Affected files:
- `.claude/scripts/pr-review/import-yaml.sh` (line 111)
- `.claude/scripts/pr-review/report.sh` (line 208)

## Example

```bash
# Bad - masks exit status
local content=$(cat "$file")

# Good - preserves exit status
local content
content=$(cat "$file")
```

## Note

Some SC2155 issues were already fixed in commit 9d70eaa. This issue tracks remaining instances.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All remaining SC2155 warnings fixed
- [ ] ShellCheck passes on all pr-review scripts

## References

- PR #13 comments: 2678709188, 2678709199
- Commit 9d70eaa (partial fix)

title: Add database indexes for cr_addressed_sha and cr_severity
description:
## Context

PR #13 review suggested adding indexes to improve query performance.

## Problem

The `comments` table lacks indexes on columns used for filtering and sorting in reports:
- `cr_addressed_sha` - filtered for resolved comments
- `cr_severity` - used for sorting by severity

## Current Status

**Premature optimization** - Current data volume is small (~200 comments). SQLite full table scans on small tables take < 1ms.

## Proposed Solution

When data volume exceeds ~1000 comments:

```sql
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_comments_cr_addressed 
    ON comments(cr_addressed_sha) 
    WHERE cr_addressed_sha IS NOT NULL;

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_comments_cr_severity 
    ON comments(cr_severity);
```

## Trigger Condition

Revisit when:
- PR reviews database exceeds 1000 comments
- OR report queries show noticeable latency

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Monitor query performance as data grows
- [ ] Add indexes when justified by volume

## References

- PR #13 comments: 2678641819, 2678708641
- CodeRabbit nitpick for indexing
